title: crocus tournefortii
intro: Crocus tournefortii, also known as the Saharan crocus, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family, native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Crocus tournefortii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory problems, and provide relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Crocus tournefortii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for medicinal purposes.
